response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the first segment (00:00-04:06), identified the performer as Yukisaki Riona and the song as 'Loveit?' by PinocchioP based on on-screen text and common VTuber repertoire. 2. Searched for lyrics using 'ラヴィット ピノキオピー lyrics' and successfully retrieved the full Japanese lyrics and English translation. 3. Analyzed the second segment (04:06-05:07). On-screen text explicitly credits the song: '作詞: Gohgo 作曲: Soma Genda / pw.a / Gohgo'. 4. Attempted to search for 'Blah Blah VIRTUAL' as it appeared on screen. Search results identified the song as 'V' by Gohgo. 5. Retrieved the full Japanese lyrics for the song 'V' from AWA. 6. Mapped the visual scenes to the song segments and constructed the final JSON.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual performer (VTuber Yukisaki Riona) giving a live performance, starting with a song titled 'Loveit?' and transitioning into a second song titled 'V' (also known as 'Blah Blah VIRTUAL'). Both songs are energetic, vocal-heavy performances with complex choreography.

scenes.description: The VTuber Yukisaki Riona performs the song 'Loveit?' (ラヴィット) by PinocchioP. She dances energetically on a stage with a heart-shaped backdrop. The performance is highly dynamic, with frequent camera angle changes and expressive character animations. Text 'Loveit?' is visible in the top-left corner.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Ah! Is this shameful? Is there no other choice? My desire is dancing
That is dangerous and this is dangerous too, which makes it so much more fun
It happens all the time, it happens all the time, a tautology of self-delusion
A one-way love affair that turned me into a weak rabbit
Boing-boing, again, boing-boing, touching
Boing-boing, again, boing-boing, coming in heat
Boing-boing, again, boing-boing, mating again and again

I love your personality, I love you though I don't know much about you
Go ahead, you can hurt me more if you'd like
I love it, stuffing its cheeks appealingly with tasteless carrots
I love it, a rabbit happily looked up at a moon with no sign of itself
